Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I was in a meeting and I heard someone talk about those Apathy Syndrome guys...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}They say there are more and more of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}A guy could be totally healthy, and then bam! He's got Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Personally, I think they're just overworking themselves, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Want to know something cool?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}You know this place is called Paulownia Mall, right? Well, you know how it got that name?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Wow, you're not some average student. Kids like you give me hope for the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}A paulownia is a type of plant, and part of the Kirijo name comes from the character for "paulownia tree."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Since this place is under the ownership of the Kirijo Group, that's how it was named. Get it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I may look like a slacker salaryman, but I know some surprising things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'm keeping up the pretense of going to work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I-I can't let my wife and little girl know that I've been laid off...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I heard the rumor about Mr. Kirijo.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}To tell the truth, Mr. Kirijo owned the company I used to work for, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}It's none of my business now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Those were the good ol' days...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'd come here with my wife and little girl, do some shopping, and eat before going home...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}That'll probably never happen again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}As you can see, I'm just a salaryman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'm not just skipping work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Ahh, I love the outdoors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Breathing the fresh air, walking around on foot... It's healthy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}You can even get a bite to eat at the café, or the burger place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Yup, I love being outdoors... even if it means skipping work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I was skipping work the other day and I saw this young man...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}He had long hair and no shirt on... Made me do a double take.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}He was like one of those hippies from back in the day... Is that look coming back into style?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Gosh... Look at all those Apathy Syndrome guys...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}They're skipping school and work, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}That's nice... I wish I had Apathy Syndrome too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Then I could sit here all day long, just like them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I was talking to someone from the Kirijo Group the other day and we got to talking about that girl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}You know, the owner's daughter, Mitsuru-san. I heard she goes to your school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Did you know that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I guess you students know more than me, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Well, even if you did know, it's useless knowledge. She's way above us lower classes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I've never known anyone as lucky as you, kid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'm so jealous... I'd skip work too often to meet anyone as high-class as that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Everyone thinks those ghost stories and Apathy Syndrome are so bad, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Personally, they make me jealous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}The rich get richer, and the poor get poorer. We working class are just worked to the bone until we wither away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}If you're going to wither and die anyway, getting Apathy Syndrome sounds like the better option.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Heh, someday you'll have jobs like mine and reach the same conclusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I guess I've been laid off... They told me the company is being "restructured"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Laid off used to mean temporary release, but nowadays, it's a euphemism for permanent release...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I may not look it, but I worked my ass off for that company...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Everything feels so pointless now... I can't get my thoughts straight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I wonder how long my money will last...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'll eventually have to get another job, for my wife and daughter, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}But I can't seem to make the effort... I'm so burned out after what happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I saw one of my old coworkers a while ago and asked how he's holding up after the restructuring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Apparently, they just filled the manager positions with a bunch of yes-men who weaseled in with their connections.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}It's important to have a supportive workplace, but that's taking it too far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}You're young. Make sure you keep it real with your friends and build true relationships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't know when it happened, but this town is a mess lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Since my life is a mess too, it feels like I'm not alone anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Ugh, I feel like the worst person alive... I'm lying to my wife and my daughter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I loved my family, but now it's like they're just baggage...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I did some research on the Internet and read some books, and I've got everything planned out now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I wish I could shake the hand of the guy who invented life insurance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Converting people's death wishes into money...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I haven't completely decided to go through with it, and I don't know if I'll tell anyone when I do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}But just in case, wish me luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I heard about the disaster from someone I know who works at Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I think it's awful the way those students are falling victim to Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}It's probably because of all the excess studying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Why would they study so hard...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I hope they don't have delusions of going to a famous university and getting a high-paying job...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Wow, I admire your apathy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}That's the spirit! Whatever happens around you, just don't give a damn about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}An attitude like that will come in handy once you enter the workforce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I sometimes see a girl drawing here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}She looks a little strange, but it's not like I care.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}She's so mysterious... It's like she lives in a different world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}She doesn't care what other people say. She's living on her own, not following anyone's orders...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}As a salaryman who follows orders for a living, I'm naturally jealous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Ouch... It still hurts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Thanks for your concern... You're a nice guy, unlike the kids I saw earlier...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I was a little tipsy last night at midnight and ended up at the gang spot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I thought kids were too cool to steal from middle-aged men now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}But they beat me until I could barely talk anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}What kind of society is so vicious to its weaker element? I feel like I've lost the will to live...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I heard something interesting from one of my coworkers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}It seems there's this strange website on the Internet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}He was reluctant to give me any details, so I don't really know anything about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}All I know is that it has something to do with revenge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I found that website. The one about revenge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I immediately thought about getting revenge on my boss, but... I chickened out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I closed the tab right away. Now I'm not even sure if I had the right URL...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}Isn't it tough to wake up early every single morning to pack me lunch? Why don't you take a day off for a change?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I'll be fine without it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}...That's what I told my wife. I feel a little better now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 401}I don't have to feel guilty while eating the lunch she made me.[n]{f 1 1}
